project_type: Static HTML website (insurance product pages) deployed to Cloudflare Workers
build_system: None - static HTML files served directly. Cloudflare Workers deployment via wrangler.
test_framework: None - no automated tests. Verification is visual/manual.
build_command: N/A - static site, no build step
verification_instructions: Open the HTML file in a browser and verify: (1) page renders correctly, (2) calculator works with lookup data, (3) dark mode toggle works, (4) responsive layout, (5) no JavaScript console errors
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML files
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external package installs needed. Static HTML files only.
contribution_requirements: Follow the design patterns in existing pages (mdwa.html). Use shared style.css and main.js. Product-specific CSS goes in inline <style> tag. Premium calculator must use exact LOOKUP method (no formulas).
key_patterns: Each product page: standalone HTML with inline <style> for product-specific CSS, references /assets/style.css and /assets/main.js, loads header/footer via component loader (div#site-header, div#site-footer), uses CSS variables from design system, supports dark mode via html.dark class, uses .fade-up class for scroll animations, calculator uses exact data lookup from JSON object. Content written in question format (bahasa pertanyaan). Keywords highlighted with colored CSS classes.
relevant_files: pages/mdwa.html (reference page - same design pattern to follow)
Sample/Mpps.html (sample MPPS page with premium data for Pria ages 18-60 and Wanita ages 18-60, including IDR and USD)
assets/main.js (shared JS - component loader, dark mode, FAQ accordion, fade-up animations)
directory_structure: / - root with index.html, /pages/ - product pages, /assets/ - shared CSS/JS, /components/ - header/footer, /Sample/ - reference sample pages, /Source/ - PDF source materials
